technical_owner_review.name: Technical Owner Review
technical_owner_review.description: Validation of the code implementation, target system architectural boundaries, and operational dependencies.

security_review.name: Security Review
security_review.description: Assessment of secret key exposures, data path security, encryption in transit, and vulnerability vectors.

legal_compliance_review.name: Legal Compliance Review
legal_compliance_review.description: Audit of third-party model licensing agreements, trademark policies, and regulatory alignment (e.g. EU AI Act).

privacy_review.name: Privacy Review
privacy_review.description: Review of personally identifiable information (PII) leakage risk, data retention, and consent workflows.

vendor_review.name: Vendor Review
vendor_review.description: Evaluation of third-party SaaS SLAs, data storage jurisdictions, and model provider data privacy agreements.

model_inventory_review.name: Model Inventory Review
model_inventory_review.description: Assessment of cataloged model details, model sizes, weights provenance, and fine-tuning histories.

risk_classification_review.name: Risk Classification Review
risk_classification_review.description: Determination of AI system risk levels under policy guidelines (e.g. Minimal, Limited, High, Unacceptable risk).

human_oversight_review.name: Human Oversight Review
human_oversight_review.description: Validation of human-in-the-loop interfaces, override systems, and fallback procedures.

retention_and_logging_review.name: Retention & Logging Review
retention_and_logging_review.description: Audit of model prompt/completion retention terms and trace logger setups.

draft_detected.label: Draft Detected
draft_detected.description: Initial scanner discovery state. No review context has been attached.

blocked_missing_context.label: Blocked — Missing Context
blocked_missing_context.description: The item cannot be approved because critical evidence gap metrics remain unresolved.

needs_human_review.label: Needs Human Review
needs_human_review.description: Basic technical parameters are verified. A general review action is required.

needs_security_review.label: Needs Security Review
needs_security_review.description: Specific potential API key, injection vector, or credential exposure requires expert security assessment.

needs_legal_review.label: Needs Legal Review
needs_legal_review.description: High-risk SDK usage or vendor terms require official compliance approval.

evidence_candidate_ready.label: Evidence Candidate Ready
evidence_candidate_ready.description: All evidence gaps are resolved. The candidate is prepared for manual sign-off and ingestion.

rejected_not_relevant.label: Rejected — Not Relevant
rejected_not_relevant.description: The finding was manually reviewed and marked as a false positive or irrelevant artifact.
